conflicts.description: SAP inventory sync is specified as both real-time and daily batch process

version_a.text: System must integrate with SAP ERP for real-time inventory synchronization.

version_b.text: System must sync product information from SAP via daily batch process.

conflicts.description: Business rule mandates real-time SAP inventory sync, directly contradicting the daily batch sync requirement

version_a.text: Inventory sync with SAP must be real-time to prevent overselling out-of-stock items.

version_b.text: System must sync product information from SAP via daily batch process.

conflicts.description: Vendor pricing control contradicts central admin-only pricing control

version_a.text: Vendors cannot set product prices; only central admin controls all pricing.

version_b.text: The system shall allow vendors to create, update, and manage their own product listings.

conflicts.description: Vendor product listing management conflicts with central admin exclusive control over products

version_a.text: Vendors must be able to manage their product information and inventory via portal.

version_b.text: The system shall allow central admins to add, edit, and deactivate products in the catalog.

conflicts.description: GDPR compliance requirement may conflict with mandatory India-only data storage, as GDPR is an EU regulation with specific data subject rights that may require data transfers or processing outside India

version_a.text: Platform must comply with GDPR regulations to support NRI customer data privacy.

version_b.text: All customer data must be stored on servers physically located within India.

conflicts.description: Real-time SAP inventory sync requirement conflicts with US-015 which also mandates real-time sync but TR-028 specifies batch — the trio creates an unresolved three-way conflict; additionally US-015 aligns with TR-027/TR-029 against TR-028

version_a.text: The system shall sync inventory levels with SAP in real time to reflect accurate stock availability.

version_b.text: System must sync product information from SAP via daily batch process.

conflicts.description: Vendor stakeholder role allows managing inventory and listings, but central admin stakeholder is described as managing products and pricing across the platform, creating overlapping and potentially conflicting ownership

version_a.text: Vendor partners manage their own inventory and product listings via dedicated login.

version_b.text: Central admin team manages products, pricing, and promotions across the platform.

conflicts.description: ZestMoney partnership is assumed to be finalized before go-live, but no functional requirement includes ZestMoney integration, creating a gap where the assumption implies a requirement that does not exist and may conflict with the 6-month go-live constraint if added late

version_a.text: ZestMoney partnership agreement will be finalized before platform go-live.

version_b.text: Platform must go live within 6 months maximum from project start.

gaps.message: 'Business Context and Background' has limited coverage.
'Project Objectives and Success Criteria' has limited coverage.
